creator.name: Nuwayama
creator.bio: Sharing authentic Ugandan food recipes from Kampala. Your G$ tips help buy fresh local ingredients!

tips.message: The Rolex (street food) recipe was incredible! 🔥 Tried it this morning.
Amazing content. Excited to see more local chefs using GoodDollar UBI!
Greetings from Kenya! Love the presentation.
